title: Podcast Guest Appearance Agreement
description: A guest release form granting a host rights to edit, distribute, and promote a guest's interview audio.
whatsCovered: Definition of creative podcast guest release, interview editing, and audio distribution
Intellectual property licensing, usage rights, and exclusivity
Payment milestones, brand payouts, and affiliate commissions
Content moderation, FTC disclosures compliance, and safety rules
Standard governing law and contract enforcement guidelines
whenToUse: Use this contract when establishing guidelines for podcast guest release, interview editing, and audio distribution to ensure legal safety for intellectual property and payments.

fields.label: Brand Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 500 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10022

clauses.heading: PODCAST GUEST APPEARANCE AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This Creator Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {provider_name}, located at {provider_address} ("Creator"), and {client_name}, located at {client_address} ("Brand").

clauses.heading: 1. Creative Deliverables & Milestones
clauses.body: Guest authorizes Host to record, edit, and distribute Guest's interview on the show: {podcast_name}.

clauses.heading: 2. Payment and Sponsorship Fees
clauses.body: Guest agrees that the appearance fee is: {appearance_fee} in exchange for promotional links.

clauses.heading: 3. Intellectual Property and FTC Disclosures
clauses.body: Host retains all copyright in the completed podcast episode and audio tracks.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Are FTC disclosures mandatory under this contract?
faq.answer: Yes. Both parties are legally required to ensure all sponsored posts include clear, conspicuous hashtags such as #ad or #sponsored.

faq.question: Who owns the video files after campaign completion?
faq.answer: The creator retains copyright in all original files, granting the brand a licensing right to share and host the assets.
